name: Twin Waves MkII
description: Dual digital oscillator. Each section independently set as VCO, LFO, or random generator with 17 VCO and 7 LFO algorithms. Built-in per-section quantizer, hard/soft sync, thru-zero FM.

controls.name: Param (encoder)
controls.description: Rotates to set the current algorithm's parameter; short press toggles between parameter edit and algorithm selection. Long press scrolls contextual help.
controls.detail: Shared between sections — Osc2 button selects which section it controls

controls.name: Fine / Level
controls.description: Fine pitch in VCO mode; output level (with FM/AM jack summing) in LFO mode.
controls.detail: Shared · white LED lights when knob matches stored value

controls.name: Coarse
controls.description: Coarse pitch in VCO; rate in LFO; clock div/mult ratio when external clock is active; 7-position octave selector when pots are locked.
controls.detail: Shared · ±3 octaves when locked · up to 16x / ÷64 clock ratio

controls.name: LFO-AM button
controls.description: Short press toggles VCO ↔ LFO mode. Long press edits the FM/AM jack role.
controls.detail: Red LED off: VCO · on: LFO

controls.name: Qtz/Clk button
controls.description: In VCO: quantizer scale menu. In LFO: internal/external clock menu. Long press sets quantizer base note.
controls.detail: Yellow LED on: quantizer or external clock active

controls.name: Sync button
controls.description: Opens sync menu — enables/disables Sync/Clk jack, selects hard or soft sync. Long press toggles absolute vs relative self-sync tracking.

controls.name: Osc2 button
controls.description: Selects which section (1 or 2) the shared knobs, encoder, and mode buttons control. Long press edits V/Oct input mode.
controls.detail: Blue LED off: Osc 1 · on: Osc 2

controls.name: Param 1 / Param 2
controls.description: Per-section input attenuators for the Param jack CV. Non-shared permanent controls.

controls.name: FM/AM/... attenuator
controls.description: Attenuator for the OSC 1 FM/AM jack. Role of jack set via LFO-AM long press.
controls.detail: Attenuates BZX / FM / VCA / QTZ base / Algo CV

inputs.name: Param 1
inputs.description: CV modulating OSC 1 algorithm parameter (e.g. PWM, spread, bit depth).

inputs.name: FM/AM/...
inputs.description: OSC 1 multi-role input: thru-zero FM (bipolar or symmetric), linear FM, VCA, quantizer base note, or algorithm select — set by LFO-AM long press.

inputs.name: Sync/Clk
inputs.description: Shared jack: sync source for either section in VCO mode, external clock in LFO mode. Per-section enabled via Sync/Qtz menus.

inputs.name: V.Oct 1
inputs.description: 1V/Oct pitch input for OSC 1 (VCO) or rate for OSC 1 (LFO).

inputs.name: V.Oct 2
inputs.description: 1V/Oct pitch input for OSC 2. V/Oct modes: Separate, Added, or Offset via Osc2 long press.

outputs.name: Out 1
outputs.description: OSC 1 main output. VCA-scaled when FM/AM jack is in VCA mode.

outputs.name: Sqr 1
outputs.description: OSC 1 sub-octave square in VCO mode (half frequency of Out 1); trigger pulse at each cycle start in LFO mode.

outputs.name: Out 2
outputs.description: OSC 2 main output, level-controlled by Fine/Level knob in LFO mode.

behaviors.name: Section sharing
behaviors.description: Encoder, Fine/Level, and Coarse knobs are virtually duplicated per section. White LEDs next to each pot light when the physical position matches the stored value — a pot only acts when its LED is on. Prevents jumps when switching sections.

behaviors.name: Pot lock and octave select
behaviors.description: Locks tuning pots of current VCO (prevents accidental detuning). Once locked, the Coarse pot becomes a 7-position transpose selector of ±3 octaves without moving the fine tuning.

behaviors.name: Normalized cross-modulation
behaviors.trigger: leave Param 1, Param 2, or Sync/Clk unpatched
behaviors.description: Param 1 is normalized to OSC 2's output, Param 2 to OSC 1's output, Sync/Clk to OSC 1's [square]. Cross-modulation (FM, PWM, sync) happens automatically without cables — the pot meters how much of the other oscillator feeds in.

behaviors.name: Thru-zero FM (BZX)
behaviors.description: Modulates OSC 1 linearly with mirrored bipolar behavior. Symmetric about zero — max positive and max negative modulation yield identical frequencies with reversed wave direction. Inoperative with Unison, Self-sync, and Noise algorithms.

behaviors.name: Per-section quantizer
behaviors.description: 19 scales per section, including quarter-tones, 19-TET, just intonation, and world scales. Long press sets Base Note — transposes the scale on the voltage-input side before quantization (distinct from Coarse transpose, which acts after).

behaviors.name: Clock-synced LFO with div/mult
behaviors.trigger: Qtz/Clk in LFO mode → external clock
behaviors.description: Coarse pot becomes a 23-position div/mult selector (16x to ÷64) applied to the Sync/Clk input tick rate. V/Oct CV sums with the Coarse setting. Enables clock-locked LFOs at musical subdivisions.

behaviors.name: Aperiodic LFO algorithms
behaviors.trigger: LFO algorithm: Randomly-timed S&H or vectors
behaviors.description: Parameter knob controls timing randomness (cyclic to fully random) separately from level randomness (always 100%). Combines with Sqr 1 trigger-per-cycle output to generate irregularly-spaced clocks.

behaviors.name: Normalled sync for self-sync
behaviors.trigger: Sync enabled with Sync/Clk unpatched in OSC 1
behaviors.description: OSC 1 syncs to itself via the normalling — useless. Always patch sync source or disable sync in OSC 1 when using self-sync algorithms; OSC 2 avoids this trap.

behaviors.name: Soft sync on sine/triangle
behaviors.trigger: Sync menu set to soft sync (sine or triangle algos)
behaviors.description: Soft sync reverses wave direction at sync edge — equivalent to through-zero FM with a square modulator. Preserves the wave's frequency across the reversal, unlike hard sync which resets phase.

behaviors.name: Autosave on power off
behaviors.description: Current state auto-saves for recall at power-up. Do not change settings within 10 seconds of switching off — the save may be interrupted.

patchIdeas.name: Dual detuned VCO
patchIdeas.patch: both sections in VCO · OSC 1 Unison (5 stacked saws) with Spread mid · OSC 2 Unison slightly detuned via Coarse · V/Oct mode Offset so V.Oct 2 adds to V.Oct 1 · fat 10-voice lead from one module
patchIdeas.diagram:
Twin Waves MkII:
* OSC 1: Unison saw, Spread noon
* OSC 2: Unison saw, Coarse +5 cents
* V/Oct mode: Offset

Sequencer:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Twin Waves MkII (V.Oct 1)
- Twin Waves MkII (Out 1) -> Output (L)
- Twin Waves MkII (Out 2) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Clock-locked random mod
patchIdeas.patch: OSC 2 in LFO mode · Randomly-timed S&H algorithm · external clock at Sync/Clk · Param 2 knob controls timing randomness · use Out 2 as stepped-random modulation synced to beat
patchIdeas.diagram:
Twin Waves MkII:
* OSC 2: LFO · Randomly-timed S&H
* Qtz/Clk: external clock
* Coarse: ÷4

Clock:

- Clock (Out) c> Twin Waves MkII (Sync/Clk)
- Twin Waves MkII (Out 2) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Twin Waves MkII (Sqr 1) t> Envelope (Trig) // trigger per cycle

patchIdeas.name: BZX FM growl
patchIdeas.patch: OSC 1 in VCO sine · FM/AM set to BZX · OSC 2 as modulator · Param 1 cross-pot taps OSC 2 back into OSC 1 phase · V.Oct 1 pitches both with Offset mode · through-zero FM bass
patchIdeas.diagram:
Twin Waves MkII:
* OSC 1: Sine · FM/AM: BZX
* OSC 2: Sine · Coarse: ratio
* V/Oct mode: Offset

Sequencer:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Twin Waves MkII (V.Oct 1)
- Twin Waves MkII (Out 2) >> Twin Waves MkII (FM/AM) // TZ-FM carrier
- Twin Waves MkII (Out 1) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Self-locked quantized melody
patchIdeas.patch: OSC 1 in VCO · Qtz Pentatonic · OSC 2 in LFO Brownian vectors as slow melodic CV · Param 1 unpatched pulls OSC 2 output into OSC 1 algorithm · vectors quantized into melody
patchIdeas.diagram:
Twin Waves MkII:
* OSC 1: Saw · Qtz: Pentatonic
* OSC 2: LFO Brownian vectors · slow rate

- Twin Waves MkII (Out 2) p> Twin Waves MkII (V.Oct 1)
- Twin Waves MkII (Out 1) -> Filter (In)

patchIdeas.name: Noise resonator
patchIdeas.patch: OSC 1 Noise Resonator algorithm · Param 1 controls Q factor · V.Oct 1 controls filter peak · LFO from OSC 2 sweeps Param 1 · melodic filtered noise drone
patchIdeas.diagram:
Twin Waves MkII:
* OSC 1: Noise Resonator · Qtz: off
* OSC 2: LFO Sine · slow

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Twin Waves MkII (V.Oct 1)
- Twin Waves MkII (Out 2) >> Twin Waves MkII (Param 1)
- Twin Waves MkII (Out 1) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Aperiodic trigger clock
patchIdeas.patch: OSC 2 LFO · Randomly-timed vectors · take Sqr 1 equivalent from OSC 1 set to LFO with same algorithm · feed trigger pulses into drum voices for irregular polyrhythm
patchIdeas.diagram:
Twin Waves MkII:
* OSC 1: LFO Randomly-timed vectors
* OSC 2: LFO Randomly-timed vectors · different rate

Drum A:
Drum B:

- Twin Waves MkII (Sqr 1) t> Drum A (Trig)
- Twin Waves MkII (Out 2) >> Drum B (Accent)
